claim_boundary: proxy-mask contracts freeze visible-only selector choices; target claims require a later held-out gate

selected.selection_rule: maximize proxy-mask fit selected exact, then top4, then avg rank

heldout_requirements: apply this contract only after the target span is redacted from calibration
run on target cases not used to choose the selector preset
run helixdiff-gate --require-repair-proof-contract before making a narrow repair claim
